#### Spatial bin

Spatial bins were defined using `r settings$context$grain$res_x`-m raster cells. A raster covering Australia buffered by 500 m was created, and the latitude and longitude coordinates at the centroid of each cell became a cell ID, using the function `add_raster_cell` from the `envRaster` package `r cite_package("envRaster")` (which calls the `cellFromXY` function in the `terra` package `r cite_package("terra")`). Records within each cell had their coordinates reassigned to these centroid coordinates. 

`r paste0(clean_text$text[i], " ", clean_text$context_text[i])`
